creator: obonhomme@nerim.net
text:
Since the last redmine upgrade, a dependency on ruby18-gems on version 1.6.1 is required.

But after doing the upgrade, it is impossible to use the rake tool on the redmine environment.

The db_migrate operation gives the following trace : 

# rake db:migrate RAILS_ENV=production --trace
(in /usr/local/www/redmine)
rake aborted!
uninitialized constant ActiveSupport::Dependencies::Mutex
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2503:in `const_missing'
/usr/local/www/redmine/vendor/rails/activesupport/lib/active_support/dependencies.rb:55
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:36:in `gem_original_require'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:36:in `require'
/usr/local/www/redmine/vendor/rails/activesupport/lib/active_support.rb:56
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:36:in `gem_original_require'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:36:in `require'
/usr/local/www/redmine/vendor/rails/railties/lib/tasks/misc.rake:18
/usr/local/www/redmine/vendor/rails/railties/lib/tasks/rails.rb:4:in `load'
/usr/local/www/redmine/vendor/rails/railties/lib/tasks/rails.rb:4
/usr/local/www/redmine/vendor/rails/railties/lib/tasks/rails.rb:4:in `each'
/usr/local/www/redmine/vendor/rails/railties/lib/tasks/rails.rb:4
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:36:in `gem_original_require'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:36:in `require'
/usr/local/www/redmine/Rakefile:10
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2383:in `load'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2383:in `raw_load_rakefile'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2017:in `load_rakefile'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2068:in `standard_exception_handling'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2016:in `load_rakefile'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2000:in `run'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:2068:in `standard_exception_handling'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/lib/rake.rb:1998:in `run'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/rake-0.8.7/bin/rake:31
/usr/local/bin/rake:19:in `load'
/usr/local/bin/rake:19

As told in redmine forum, it seems that redmine needs a gems version
between 1.3 and 1.5 like said here :
http://www.redmine.org/boards/1/topics/22314?r=22315

How-To-Repeat: Execute rake db:migrate RAILS_ENV=production --trace with redmine 1.1.2
and ruby18-gems-1.6.1
